entities.name: Alzheimer disease
entities.description: Highly heritable neurodegenerative disease with heritability up to 76%
entities.evidence: Alzheimer's disease (AD) is a highly heritable disease (with heritability up to 76%)

entities.name: late onset Alzheimer disease
entities.description: Late-onset form of AD; PICALM is a susceptibility locus
entities.evidence: susceptibility locus for late-onset Alzheimer's disease (LOAD)

entities.name: PICALM
entities.description: Phosphatidylinositol-binding clathrin assembly protein gene; LOAD susceptibility locus
entities.evidence: phosphatidylinositol-binding clathrin assembly protein (PICALM) gene as a susceptibility locus for late-onset Alzheimer's disease

entities.name: PICALM
entities.description: Phosphatidylinositol-binding clathrin assembly protein; modulates amyloid-beta production, transport, and clearance
entities.evidence: PICALM affects AD risk primarily by modulating production, transportation, and clearance of beta-amyloid (Abeta) peptide

entities.name: amyloid-beta
entities.description: Beta-amyloid peptide; its production, transport, and clearance are modulated by PICALM
entities.evidence: modulating production, transportation, and clearance of beta-amyloid (Abeta) peptide

entities.name: tau
entities.description: Tau protein implicated in tauopathy pathway of AD
entities.evidence: other Abeta-independent pathways are discussed, including tauopathy

entities.name: tauopathy
entities.description: Tau-related pathology discussed as Abeta-independent pathway in PICALM-mediated AD

entities.name: synaptic dysfunction
entities.description: Disruption of synaptic function; Abeta-independent pathway in PICALM-mediated AD

entities.name: clathrin-mediated endocytosis
entities.description: Endocytic pathway involving clathrin assembly; PICALM participates in this pathway

entities.name: amyloid-beta clearance
entities.description: Clearance mechanism for amyloid-beta peptide modulated by PICALM
entities.evidence: modulating production, transportation, and clearance of beta-amyloid (Abeta) peptide

entities.name: lipid metabolism
entities.description: Lipid metabolism pathway disrupted in PICALM-associated AD

entities.name: iron homeostasis
entities.description: Iron homeostasis pathway disrupted in PICALM-associated AD

entities.name: immune response
entities.description: Immune disorder pathway discussed in PICALM-associated AD
